name: Natural Grocers by Vitamin Cottage, Inc.
summary: Natural Grocers by Vitamin Cottage, Inc. is a specialty retailer of natural and organic groceries and dietary supplements operating 169 stores in 21 states as of September 30, 2025. The company sells only USDA certified organic produce, pasture-raised dairy, free-range eggs, humanely sourced meats, and dietary supplements, averaging approximately 20,000 SKUs per comparable store, including ~6,500 supplement SKUs. It also provides free nutrition education through trained staff, Health Hotline magazine, and Nutritional Health Coaches.

products.name: Natural and Organic Groceries
products.description: USDA certified organic produce and grocery products free of artificial flavors, preservatives, sweeteners, synthetic colors, and hydrogenated oils.

products.name: Dietary Supplements
products.description: Approximately 6,500 SKUs of dietary supplements per comparable store meeting strict quality guidelines.

products.name: Body Care Products
products.description: Natural body care products meeting the company's strict quality and ingredient standards.

products.name: Pet Care Products
products.description: Natural pet care products sold as part of the company's broader natural product offering.

products.name: Natural Grocers Brand Products
products.description: Private label products sold under the Natural Grocers brand name.

products.name: Health Hotline Magazine
products.description: Free science-based nutrition education publication provided to customers.

products.name: Nutrition Education Services
products.description: Free nutrition education via trained Crew members, NHCs, classes, cooking demonstrations, and one-on-one health coaching.
